name: subagent-router
description: A lightweight skill for Codex and Claude Code that keeps the main session small by routing suitable work to subagents.

interface.longDescription: Subagent Router adds a concise workflow for deciding when to delegate search, implementation, testing, and review work to isolated subagents while keeping the main session focused on coordination and final decisions. It is usable from Codex and Claude Code.
defaultPrompt: Use Subagent Router while working on this task.
Use Subagent Router and keep the main session concise.
